import sys

def main():
    # The spec requires printing 'OK' on a single line and exiting 0.
    # It also specifies reading input from the first command-line argument,
    # although the logic does not depend on the content of that input.
    print("OK")
    sys.exit(0)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
